title: Could Guardiola's best and Arteta's worst month decide title?
summary: April emerges as a critical month in the Premier League title race, with Arsenal and Manchester City's contrasting form potentially deciding the outcome. Statistical analysis reveals key factors that could determine the champions.
content: As the Premier League season approaches its finale, April could be the defining month for leaders Arsenal and closest challengers Manchester City. BBC Sport looks at the stats to explain why.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉的最佳表现和阿尔特塔的最差月份能否决定英超冠军？
zh.summary: 四月成为英超冠军争夺战中的关键月份，阿森纳和曼城截然不同的表现可能决定最终结果。统计分析揭示了可能决定英超冠军的关键因素。

title: A tough season, playing angry, and messaging Michael Owen
summary: Aston Villa and England striker Ollie Watkins reflects on a difficult season, his intense approach to the game, and communication with Michael Owen. He discusses both personal struggles and his ambitions.
content: Ollie Watkins speaks to Kelly Somers about Aston Villa, England and his World Cup dream.

zh.title: 艰难的赛季、愤怒的比赛和与迈克尔·欧文的互动
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉和英格兰前锋奥利·沃特金斯反思了一个困难的赛季、他在比赛中的强硬态度以及与迈克尔·欧文的沟通。他讨论了个人的挣扎和他的雄心壮志。

title: This season my toughest moment - Watkins
summary: Ollie Watkins opens up about his toughest moment this season as he battles to recapture the form that made him successful in previous campaigns with Aston Villa.
content: Aston Villa and England striker Ollie Watkins opens up on his struggles to recapture his form from previous seasons.

zh.title: 这个赛季我最艰难的时刻——沃特金斯
zh.summary: 奥利·沃特金斯开诚布公地谈论了他本赛季最艰难的时刻，因为他正在努力恢复他在阿斯顿维拉之前赛季中成功的状态。

title: Madrid slam Mbappé penalty denial in costly draw
summary: Real Madrid criticized the referee for not awarding a penalty that could have altered the outcome of their 1-1 draw with Girona. The decision proved costly as Los Blancos dropped points in a tightly contested match.
content: Álvaro Arbeloa said Real Madrid should have been awarded what might have been a decisive penalty in their 1-1 draw with Girona

zh.title: 皇马抨击裁判未判点球 平局付出代价
zh.summary: 皇马批评裁判未判给一个本可改变比赛结果的点球，导致他们与吉罗纳1:1平局。这个判罚决定代价高昂，皇马在一场势均力敌的比赛中丢分。

title: West Ham take 'big step' to put Spurs in drop zone
summary: West Ham United strengthened their Premier League survival hopes while simultaneously pushing Tottenham into the relegation zone with a decisive victory. Coach Nuno Espirito Santo called it a pivotal moment in their fight to stay up.
content: West Ham United coach Nuno Espirito Santo said his side took a "big step" toward Premier League survival after dropping Spurs into the Premier League relegation zone.

zh.title: 西汉姆迈出"重要一步"将热刺送入降级区
zh.summary: 西汉姆联通过关键胜利加强了英超保级希望，同时将托特纳姆热刺推入降级区。教练努诺·埃斯皮里托·桑托称这是他们保级战斗中的关键时刻。

title: Balogun equals Neymar goal streak; Pogba returns
summary: Folarin Balogun scored in his seventh consecutive Ligue 1 match, equaling Neymar's recent streak, while Paul Pogba made his injury return. Despite the individual performances, AS Monaco suffered a heavy 4-1 defeat to Paris FC.
content: Folarin Balogun scored for a seventh successive Ligue 1 game and Paul Pogba returned from injury but AS Monaco was blown out 4-1 by Paris FC on Friday.

zh.title: 巴洛贡追平内马尔连进球纪录；博格巴复出
zh.summary: 福拉林·巴洛贡在法甲第七场连续进球，追平了内马尔最近的纪录，保罗·博格巴因伤复出。尽管个人表现亮眼，摩纳哥遭遇巴黎FC 4:1的惨败。

title: Inter dealt blow as Martínez suffers injury relapse
summary: Inter Milan's season has been dealt a significant blow after star striker Lautaro Martínez suffered a recurring muscle injury just days into his return from a seven-week absence. The setback threatens the club's attacking depth at a crucial stage.
content: Inter Milan have confirmed that star striker Lautaro Martínez suffered a recurring muscle injury just days after his return from a seven-week spell on the sidelines.

zh.title: 国际米兰遭打击 马丁内斯伤病复发
zh.summary: 国际米兰的赛季遭受重大打击，明星前锋劳塔罗·马丁内斯在缺阵七周后复出仅几天就遭遇肌肉伤病复发。这一挫折威胁到俱乐部在关键时期的进攻深度。

title: Hayes: Wilson ready for U.S.-Japan triple-header
summary: USWNT forward Sophia Wilson is approaching full fitness and could feature in all three upcoming matches against Japan, according to head coach Emma Hayes. The development provides flexibility for the crucial series.
content: USWNT forward Sophia Wilson is getting closer to 90 minutes fit and could play in all three upcoming games against Japan, head coach Emma Hayes said.

zh.title: 海耶斯：威尔逊准备好参加美日三连战
zh.summary: 美国女足前锋索菲亚·威尔逊已接近完全康复，根据主教练埃玛·海耶斯所说，她可能在即将进行的与日本的三场比赛中全部出场。这一进展为这个关键系列赛提供了灵活性。

title: Lyon coach 'not satisfied' with Brazil teen Endrick
summary: Lyon coach Paulo Fonseca has expressed frustration with teenage Brazilian forward Endrick's recent displays and is demanding improved performances. The young talent faces pressure to deliver after a period of inconsistent form.
content: Lyon coach Paulo Fonseca said he is unhappy with Endrick's form and is demanding more from the teenage Brazil forward.

zh.title: 里昂主教练对巴西少年恩德里克"不满意"
zh.summary: 里昂主教练保罗·丰塞卡对巴西少年前锋恩德里克最近的表现表示沮丧，并要求提高表现。这位年轻天才在经历一段不稳定的表现后面临着交付成果的压力。
